name: Impossible Greek Spinach Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a greased dish, layer spinach, chopped green onions, and cottage cheese.
3. Mix remaining ingredients in a blender until smooth.
4. Pour the blended mixture over the cheese layer.
5. Bake for 35-45 minutes, or until a knife inserted into the center comes out clean.
